arts.ttl: Celtic 'opt out' of Premier Sports deal as TV blackout for blockbuster Aberdeen clash rubber stamped
arts.sum: The top two will face off at Celtic Park later this month

arts.ttl: Luke McCowan tells Aberdeen 'you're not title contenders YET' as Celtic star hits Dons with 7 game reality check
arts.sum: McCowan reckons seven league wins on the trot isn't enough to make ANYONE a title contender

arts.ttl: Celtic history makers see Champions League party spoiled by Twente as SWPL winners receive harsh lesson
arts.sum: The SWPL champions suffered a 2-0 defeat in their historic first clash in the Champions League group stage

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart delivers verdict on Celtic Champions League structure amid defiant Rodgers stance
arts.sum: With Celtic’s next European fixture against Atalanta taking place in just over two weeks, Michael Stewart has had his say on how the reigning Scottish Premiership champions should look to set themselves up against elite opposition across the rest of the league phase. Speaking on the Scottish Football Social Club, Stewart believes Celtic only need to make slight adjustments out of possession to give themselves a better chance of avoiding heavy margins of defeat in the Champions League .

arts.ttl: Nicolas Kuhn makes firm Celtic vow as 'unbelievable' start a sign of things to come
arts.sum: Celtic enter the international break with the vast majority of their reflections being positive amid a brilliant domestic start, with their Champions League defeat in Dortmund the only blindspot. Despite their Champions League hiccup, Nicolas Kuhn has made a firm vow regarding his side’s prospects for the rest of this term.

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney's Celtic return prophecy comes into view as Arsenal exit 'accepted' with salary roadblock cleared
arts.sum: The left-back is reportedly set to leave the Emirates on loan in January

arts.ttl: Celtic told Aberdeen 'don't fear' Parkhead trip as ex-captain demands belief they can stun Hoops
arts.sum: Dons legend Miller wants to see Aberdeen come to Glasgow and challenge Celtic and has urged Jimmy Thelin not to change their style of play for the Parkhead clash. Former Aberdeen hero, Willie Miller, is in no doubt how he thinks his old club should be set up and his advice to Thelin could well play into Celtic boss, Brendan Rodgers’ hands.

arts.ttl: Marvin Bartley points out exactly what was so 'important' about Celtic's late show at Ross County
arts.sum: Eventually, Celtic prevailed against Ross County to end the week on a positive note, setting up a top-of-the-table Scottish Premiership clash against Aberdeen on the other side of the international break. Celtic survived going a goal down against Ross County to recover and record a late victory to maintain their spot at the top of the Scottish Premiership table.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers' demand for attacking football has allowed one Celtic hero to shine
arts.sum: And as Brendan Rodgers looks to continue to demand flowing attacking football at Celtic, one player has shone after a tough start to his Hoops career. But now, with a full pre-season under his belt, the stats are showing that the German winger has become one of Celtic’s most potent attacking threats in the opening seven games of the season.

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart shares the position he thinks Celtic need to address to thrive in Champions League
arts.sum: Speaking on the Scottish Football Social Club, Stewart pointed to the wide areas as a position he feels Celtic may need ‘an extra little bit of something’ in to give them more authority in the Champions League . Nicolas Kuhn can deliver for Celtic in the Champions League
